prose: No frontier-orbitals calculation was run, so there is no computed HOMO/LUMO/gap value to report. I did not guess or fabricate a number. The requested method would have been DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP), gas phase, on the user-supplied geometry `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/benzene/benzene.xyz`, but the charge and multiplicity were not confirmed after I asked. Engine integrity.trustworthy verdict: not available because no chemkit result was produced. Warnings: no chemkit warnings are available because no chemkit tool run was performed.
